before.name: web-app
values:
applications:
  name: web
  retry: true
  rollout:
    maxUnavailable: 1
  env:
    LOG_LEVEL: info

after.name: web-app
values:
applications:
  name: web
  retry: false
  rollout:
    maxUnavailable: 1
  env:
    LOG_LEVEL: debug
